blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I was about to call you.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Nadia Reyes. She's from Charlotte. Has been for four years — moved after grad school.
Julian said nothing for a moment. The name on his legal pad. The name he'd turned over.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: You need to keep this between us. Don't approach her. Don't change anything in how you interact with that house. She's been managing this for a long time and she's very good at it. If she feels the net closing she'll have a plan for that too.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Mr. Crane. You understand I can't build a case on an IP address and a behavioral read.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I know. You need the tox. You need the physical evidence from the bracket. You need Wren.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: She noticed someone missing from the table during the evening window. She told Cade last night. She's going to tell you today. When she does — be patient with her. She'll get there.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: How do you know she told Cade.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Because I watched the lights in the house last night. Her room went dark at eleven-thirty. Nadia's was already off. They had a conversation Nadia may have partially overheard.
